message:
fix(btree,mvcc,vdbe,parser): freelist enhancements, SSI refinement, and codegen improvements

B-tree:
- balance: improve rebalancing edge case
- be_tree: minor fix
- cursor: further cursor navigation refinement
- freelist: expand freelist management with improved trunk page handling

Builtins:
- Add additional string function safety checks

MVCC:
- shared_lock_table: improve lock table management
- sheaf_conformal: minor fix
- ssi_validation: refine serialization conflict detection
- witness_refinement: improve witness path resolution

Pager:
- arc_cache: remove unused code

Parser:
- semantic: improve semantic analysis
- semantic_test: expand test coverage

Planner/VDBE:
- codegen: improve code generation for complex queries
- engine: simplify engine execution path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
